Re-Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Aug-28-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES: Atty. RYAN B. KADEVARI, ESQ. of Weinberg, Roger & Rosenfeld (Tel: 510-337-1001) appearing for petitioners;
No other appearances made in this matter.

PETITIONERS' PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD.

The tentative ruling is not contested. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Petitioners' petition to compel arbitration award is granted. No opposition filed. The Court signs a formal order and a separate judgment.

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: Sean Kane, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, torreanom@aol.com, Reported. (302/HK)
